sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data available in documentation

special_mechanics.name: Helicopter Flight Control
special_mechanics.description: Player controls a helicopter with guns and missiles. Primary movement mechanic is flight-based rather than traditional platformer jumping.

special_mechanics.name: Air Brake
special_mechanics.description: Distinctive helicopter feature allowing directional braking during flight segments.

special_mechanics.name: Perspective Switching
special_mechanics.description: Third-person behind-view during normal rail shooting gameplay; switches to top-down perspective for boss battles. No physics impact but affects perceived movement.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative. Super Thunder Blade is a rail shooter, not a traditional platformer. Player controls helicopter movement rather than character physics. No quantitative movement parameters documented in available sources. Game mechanics are qualitative only.
